queries.query: SELECT id, name, introduction FROM instructor ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, introduction FROM instructor WHERE id = ?
UPDATE instructor SET name = ?, introduction = ? WHERE id = ?
INSERT INTO course (title, description, price, level, instructor_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT id, title, description, price, level, instructor_id FROM course ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, title, description, price, level, instructor_id FROM course WHERE id = ?
UPDATE course SET title = ?, description = ?, price = ?, level = ?, instructor_id = ? WHERE id = ?
INSERT INTO content (title, content_type, content, seq, course_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
